title: CI/CD Automation
description: I implement efficient CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins, GitHub Actions, and GitLab CI. Automate testing, building, and deployment workflows to ensure rapid, reliable delivery of applications.

title: Scalable Microservices Infrastructure
description: CI/CD, Docker, and Kubernetes-based microservices deployment with scalability and automation.

title: Deployment with Docker & Kubernetes
description: I containerize applications with Docker and deploy them using Kubernetes. Manage orchestration, auto-scaling, and high availability across distributed systems.

title: Cloud Infrastructure
description: I architect and manage cloud infrastructure using AWS services such as EC2, S3, IAM, and VPC. Focus on scalability, security, and automation.

title: Infrastructure as Code
description: I provision and manage infrastructure using Terraform and Ansible. Enable consistent, repeatable deployments across environments.

title: Monitoring & Alerting
description: I monitor systems with Prometheus and Grafana. Configure real-time alerts and visualize application performance to ensure uptime and reliability.
